title: Sharing News

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two single or multi-message switches
record:
a leading question on one switch  
a response on the other

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Decide with the switch user what news they want to share.
2. The switch user presses the switch with a leading question e.g. "guess what I did yesterday?"
3.  Then they press the switch with the response e.g. "I went to the beach, it was so much fun!"
4. Another question can be added after the response to keep things going e.g. "what did you get up to?"

tooltipText: Activate 2 switches to share news and ask questions
